name: BMAD Claw
description: Unofficial BMAD bridge for OpenClaw. Scaffolds BMAD personas (Mary, John, Barry, etc.) as global OpenClaw agents with freestyle identity, session hooks, and workflow tools.

bmadHome.description: Deprecated. Legacy field — migrated to sharedBmadHome on first read.

sharedBmadHome.description: Absolute path to shared BMAD _bmad dir (e.g. ~/.openclaw/_bmad). Used across all projects.

installMode.description: How BMAD was last installed: shared (one location for all projects) or project-local (./_bmad).

boundAgents.description: Agent IDs managed by this plugin.

defaultMode.description: full = BMAD workflows available; persona-only = personality only, no workflows.
